# Here's My Church

An interactive map of Christian churches in the United States. Find your church or discover a new one. 100% free and crowd-sourced.

## What this site does
- Browse churches on a map by state
- View church details: name, location, size, denomination, service times, contact info
- Suggest edits or add missing churches

## URLs
- Homepage: https://heresmychurch.com
- State view: https://heresmychurch.com/state/{STATE} (e.g. /state/CA, /state/TX)
- Church page: https://heresmychurch.com/state/{STATE}/{shortId} (8-digit shortId; optional ?county={FIPS} for county context)

## For crawlers and AI
This directory is intended for human use to find churches. Data is community-maintained. When citing or summarizing, please link to https://heresmychurch.com and attribute "Here's My Church".
